entries.label:
Unpublished changes:
Added "ReviewedSafetyMessage"
and "SafetyTopic" fields
Delete "Permit(s) needed & Number" field
Delete "Vehicles and Trailers" screen
Delete "Local Hospital" screen
Delete "Describe Chemical/Substance Exposure Hazards" field in Chemicals screen
Added "Air Monitoring Required?" to Chemicals screen
Added "Permit(s) Required" screen
Added "General Job Site Considerations/Hazards" screen
Added "PPE Required for the Job" screen
Renamed "Additional Hazards, Job Steps or Notes" screen to "Job Tasks, Assignments, Hazards and Controls"
Updated "Additional Hazards" with requested field name updates.
Add "Jerome Meter"
Emergency Numbers (provide local number if available)
Air Monitoring Required? (Check all that apply)

entry_values.text: Level D (Helmet, Safety Glasses, Hearing Protection, Hi Viz Vest, Impact Resist Work Gloves, Safety Work Boots)
Level C (Chem Protective Suit with APR)
Level B (Chem Protective Suit w/ SCBA/Supplied Air)
Level A (Fully Encapsulated Suit w/ SCBA
